positive: A minimalist, highly contrasted circular emblem featuring a stylized celestial creature—a winged manta ray soaring over abstract neon-lit mountains. The manta ray should be rendered in crisp, solid black silhouette against a vibrant gradient background of deep sapphire blue, electric cyan, and magenta. Incorporate abstract cosmic dust trails and geometric vaporwave elements (like interlocking circles and sharp triangles) that frame the main subject, giving it a clean, symmetrical composition. The overall aesthetic must be graphic, vaporwave-inspired, and highly suitable for screen printing on apparel. Style: Vector illustration, Pop Art, Synthwave, high contrast, smooth lines. Focus on clean edges and maximum visual punch.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, grainy, low resolution, watermark, text, signature, logo, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, complex composition, realistic, photorealism
